fact: Autonomous Kanban project created to track goal-driven daily tasks with GitHub Pages live board at bahonsbot.github.io/marvin-workspace/autonomous-kanban/.

Board sync fixed (Mar 12): Fixed drift between sync-board.js and autonomous-task-executor.py by using real sources of truth - Open Backlog -> todo, In Progress -> inprogress, tasks-log.md verified entries -> done.
GitHub Pages workflow fixed: Corrected stale archived path reference to projects/market-intel-news-reader/app/* that was causing build failures.

Trustworthiness hardening: Done column now requires verified output file exists. Invalidated false completion claim for encouraging-message Python task. Cleaned AUTONOMOUS.md state of fake/stale entries.

Executor improvements: Rich tasks no longer create placeholder files - they are queued for sub-agent work. Only small script/automation tasks stay on direct executor path. Added memory/executor-last-result.json tracking.

Queue architecture changed: Switched from isolated cron nested delegation to main-session wakeup (autonomous-queue-wakeup cron). Added queue_state.py helper with status, can-start, heal-stale commands.

Prerequisite-gate implemented: Tasks missing required human input now move to Needs Input state with focused blocker question. Detection rules: followed-companies without starter list, tasks depending on unspecified source work or personal workflow choice.

Agent-team integration: Executor now classifies tasks into execution modes (direct, subagent, agent_team). agent_team mode routes implementation-heavy tasks through Marvin -> Builder -> Reviewer workflow.

Git sync reliability fix (Mar 16): Added git pull --rebase before push in publish_kanban_board_if_changed() to prevent merge conflicts when remote has new commits. Fix applied in scripts/autonomous-task-executor.py. Resolved existing divergence with --ours strategy on board.json conflict.

Autonomous Kanban generator fix (Mar 19, 22:34 ICT): See mission-control fact mc-XXX - patched scripts/daily-task-generator.py to preserve existing Open Backlog items and append fresh tasks instead of overwriting. Restored two displaced Personal backlog tasks into AUTONOMOUS.md. Durable lesson: generator/executor logic must agree on backlog age semantics; replacing backlog breaks executor's oldest-task-first behavior.
